# MeetJapan

MeetJapan is a calm, practical guide for foreign travelers visiting Japan.

## Core article URLs
- https://meetjapan.example/articles/mobile-suica.html
- https://meetjapan.example/articles/tax-free-shopping.html
- https://meetjapan.example/articles/atm-guide.html
- https://meetjapan.example/articles/luggage-forwarding.html
- https://meetjapan.example/articles/tattoo-onsen.html
- https://meetjapan.example/articles/express-train.html
- https://meetjapan.example/articles/donki-guide.html

## Topic summary
- transport
- money
- shopping
- onsen
- arrival comfort

## Editorial style
- short answers first
- practical for first-time travelers
- low-stress reading on mobile
